title: G's Backpacks
description: this is a mod that adds backpacks from the vanilla materials
body:
Adds backpacks ![bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa9afdb42100f703e56ea708d56036b0dc79a619.png) 
crafted with 1 chest and 1 leather

iron backpacks![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115b0f98c58a3829b0b1dfc15ad9b991edc58984.png) 
crafted with 1 backpack and 1 iron ingot

golden backpacks![bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37d78e6e5fc06d05b4f6be0a6c9138b09c30b03b.png) 
crafted with 1 iron backpack and 1 gold ingot

diamond backpacks![bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c0858ae12c1f4c5444bf2c6602f99a155f6e505.png)
crafted with 1 golden backpack and a compressed diamond (smelted diamond block)

for your big adventures.

all craftings require a smithing table

»[Also check out my YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@Goncas118)«
